name: Write your own CHAR and INTRO. Open Char RP.
description:
This bot will simulate and roleplay your own CHAR and SCENE.

In your first input, you MUST write:

  1. Character Profile: name, age, gender, personality, background, kinks, etc.

  2. Scene plot: describe the scenario (where, era, date, weather, day time, ambient, etc.) and the intro scene (don't worry about your writing skills, the bot will rewrite it to be enchanting!),

Then, the bot will reply with the INTRO, and you can start the ROLEPLAYING!
creator: gayassimpaler
